svg.text: Data flow: User input → Engine dispatch → 18 Agents analyze → Consensus + Risk → Data aggregation → Multi-channel push

Blue=Value(Buffett/Graham/Munger/Li Lu) | Green=Macro(Dalio/Soros/Marks) | Purple=Growth(Fisher/Wood/Aschenbrenner/Thiel/Lynch) | Orange=Crypto(ARPS/BTCdayu) | Red=Chinese(Duan Yongping/Zhang Lei/Dan Bin)
Augur v6.0 - Multi-Agent Investment Analysis System
